title: 弥生賞の後に・君にサプライズ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki stuns the audience at the Yayoi Sho,
and expectations for her to claim the Classic
Triple Crown rise even higher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She begins training even harder than ever to meet
those expectations. I'm touched by her
dedication and plan a surprise to reward her hard
work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to give her a star, so I attempt sleight of
hand to conjure a brooch shaped like the evening
star... Unfortunately, my trick ends in failure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite my fumbling, Fuji Kiseki is still touched
by my gesture. At last, next up for us is the
Satsuki Sho.
